title: Compound
Formula
Description
table-244-244.caption: What are the bonds that have phosphorus and nitrogen as their atom elements?
data: Cyclic or polymeric compounds with alternating phosphorus and nitrogen atoms.
Derivatives of phosphoric acid with a nitrogen atom directly bonded to the phosphorus.
Similar to phosphoramidates, but with sulfur replacing oxygen.
Compounds formed by the reaction of phosphines with azides or imines.
